impact_evidence: Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Topsoil degradation and loss of soil fertility -> "the mine's smelter contaminated the residential areas around the mine with lead fumes, which lingered in the soil and dust." | "The government's main clean-up strategy has been to plant grass in the area to reduce dust and provide clean topsoil." || Environmental | Water Resources | Surface water pollution and quality degradation -> "Traces have also been found in some surface water in the area." || Environmental | Air & Climate | Dust generation -> "lead is all around Kasuba's sons, in the dirt they play with or that swirls in the dry air and that ends up on their hands" | "windblown lead dust continues to jeopardise community health." || Environmental | Land, Soil & Geology | Transport corridors and access road impacts -> "government failed to address several ongoing sources of lead dust, including unpaved roads and the old mine itself." | "pave roads in contaminated areas to prevent lead dust from harming residents." || Social | Health, Safety & Well-being | Mental and physical health impacts on communities -> "each of the 246 children under the age of 7 it screened had enough lead in their blood to cause neurological impairments." | "Kasuba spoke of headaches and said that her six-year-old son also complained about them." || Social | Health, Safety & Well-being | Community exposure to dust, noise, pollution -> "lead is all around Kasuba's sons, in the dirt they play with or that swirls in the dry air and that ends up on their hands" | "windblown lead dust continues to jeopardise community health." || Governance | Risk Management & Long-Term Stewardship | Closure planning and post-mining reclamation governance -> "The government's main clean-up strategy has been to plant grass in the area to reduce dust and provide clean topsoil.
